title: Define MeshCore compatibility minimum command matrix
description: Why this exists: MeshCore research found a byte-command local API with mandatory startup, device info, contacts, messaging, and async event behavior, plus many repeater/admin flows that should not silently drop. What needs to be done: classify MeshCore commands as mandatory, optional, stubbed, or unsupported for LICHEN compatibility and define response codes. Acceptance criteria: matrix covers CMD_DEVICE_QUERY, CMD_APP_START, contacts, direct/channel text, battery/storage, stats, custom vars, auto-add config, ACK/message push, repeater/admin/login/binary/control/raw flows; unsupported commands return deterministic RESP_CODE_ERR or documented no-op.
design:
MeshCore compatibility minimum command matrix, recorded 2026-07-01.

Source baseline:
- meshcore-dev/MeshCore e8d3c53ba1ea863937081cd0caad759b832f3028, examples/companion_radio/MyMesh.cpp command constants and dispatcher lines 6-65, 71-135, 1008-1992.
- meshcore-dev/meshcore-open e1b8d6ec97d6ccca0eee8122864092f3af3f2062, documentation/ble-protocol.md command/response tables and Flutter connector behavior.
- meshcore_py 5bac3573b51c4298062881885b6d15a994109076 and meshcore.js 306dadac1cdacfd071ab6899e5c84e7def7c4425 used as secondary client references; Python is stale for some newer commands.

Default response policy:
- Recognized but unsupported commands return RESP_CODE_ERR (0x01) with ERR_CODE_UNSUPPORTED_CMD (1), unless a more specific error below is listed.
- Malformed length/range returns ERR_CODE_ILLEGAL_ARG (6).
- Unknown peer/contact/channel returns ERR_CODE_NOT_FOUND (2).
- Queue/table/resource exhaustion returns ERR_CODE_TABLE_FULL (3).
- Busy iterator or invalid session/order returns ERR_CODE_BAD_STATE (4).
- Disabled security-sensitive operations may return RESP_CODE_DISABLED (0x0f) when matching MeshCore behavior, but ERR_UNSUPPORTED is also acceptable if documented in vectors.
- OK/no-op is allowed only for harmless compatibility-local state where returning success will not imply MeshCore RF interoperability, native key exposure, or real radio mutation.

Command matrix:

| ID | MeshCore command | LICHEN MVP status | Response policy / mapping |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0x01 | CMD_APP_START | Mandatory | Decode app name/reserved; reset session iterators; return RESP_CODE_SELF_INFO from HAL plus MeshCore compatibility identity. Identity/public key fields blocked on project-LICHEN-9c4y.14. |
| 0x02 | CMD_SEND_TXT_MSG | Optional, unsupported until identity projection | After 9c4y.14 and shared message contract, map known 6-byte prefix to LICHEN unicast. Until then ERR_NOT_FOUND for unknown prefix or ERR_UNSUPPORTED for unsupported txt_type. |
| 0x03 | CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG | Mandatory if messaging claimed | Validate txt_type plain, channel index, text length; map to shared LICHEN app message ingress. Current firmware returns OK while docs/Flutter imply SENT; project-LICHEN-9c4y.16 resolves final ACK. Until send path exists, ERR_UNSUPPORTED or ERR_NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x04 | CMD_GET_CONTACTS | Mandatory safe baseline | Return CONTACTS_START count=0 then END_OF_CONTACTS, or synthesized contacts after 9c4y.14/peer table. BAD_STATE only if iterator state is implemented and busy. |
| 0x05 | CMD_GET_DEVICE_TIME | Mandatory read | Return RESP_CODE_CURR_TIME with uptime/time-provider seconds. If no wall clock, return deterministic uptime/zero policy documented in vectors. |
| 0x06 | CMD_SET_DEVICE_TIME | Optional/stub | If a LICHEN time-set provider exists, update it and OK. Otherwise accept compatibility-local monotonic/non-decreasing value or ERR_UNSUPPORTED; past-time/invalid values ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG. |
| 0x07 | CMD_SEND_SELF_ADVERT | Unsupported/no-op | MeshCore advert is RF-specific. Return ERR_UNSUPPORTED, or OK only if explicitly documented as a local no-op for app UX. |
| 0x08 | CMD_SET_ADVERT_NAME | Optional compatibility-local | Store compatibility-local display name if config store exists; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Must not mutate native trust identity without policy. |
| 0x09 | CMD_ADD_UPDATE_CONTACT | Optional compatibility-local | Unsupported until contact store/projection exists. With store, affects MeshCore-local contacts only. ERR_TABLE_FULL/ILLEGAL_ARG as appropriate. |
| 0x0a | CMD_SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE | Mandatory if incoming messaging claimed | Return next queued CONTACT_MSG_RECV_V3/CHANNEL_MSG_RECV_V3/CHANNEL_DATA_RECV or RESP_CODE_NO_MORE_MESSAGES. Queue owned by adapter/shared app event boundary. |
| 0x0b | CMD_SET_RADIO_PARAMS | Unsupported | Would mutate LICHEN RF profile outside protocol policy. Return ERR_UNSUPPORTED or ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG for malformed. |
| 0x0c | CMD_SET_RADIO_TX_POWER | Policy-gated | May map only to existing tx_power_dbm config path if allowed; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Never bypass LICHEN region/radio policy. |
| 0x0d | CMD_RESET_PATH | Unsupported until identity/projection | MeshCore path is not LICHEN routing. Return ERR_UNSUPPORTED or ERR_NOT_FOUND for unknown contact. |
| 0x0e | CMD_SET_ADVERT_LATLON | Optional compatibility-local | Validate lat/lon; store only compatibility-local advertised location unless native location policy exists. Invalid coords ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG. |
| 0x0f | CMD_REMOVE_CONTACT | Optional compatibility-local | Unsupported until contact store exists; then remove only compatibility-local contact. |
| 0x10 | CMD_SHARE_CONTACT | Unsupported | MeshCore zero-hop/flood contact share is RF-specific. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x11 | CMD_EXPORT_CONTACT | Optional compatibility-local | If contact/self projection exists, export compatibility contact frame; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x12 | CMD_IMPORT_CONTACT | Optional compatibility-local | If compatibility contact store exists, parse and store; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x13 | CMD_REBOOT | Unsupported by default | Device management policy required. Return ERR_UNSUPPORTED; do not reboot from compatibility shim by default. |
| 0x14 | CMD_GET_BATT_AND_STORAGE | Mandatory read | Return RESP_CODE_BATT_AND_STORAGE using HAL battery/storage if available; otherwise explicit placeholder values (e.g. 0/0) documented in vectors. |
| 0x15 | CMD_SET_TUNING_PARAMS | Unsupported | MeshCore airtime/tuning semantics do not map to LICHEN. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x16 | CMD_DEVICE_QUERY | Mandatory | Return RESP_CODE_DEVICE_INFO with protocol/version, max contacts/channels, BLE PIN policy, build/model/version, repeat/path hash placeholders. BLE PIN details blocked on 9c4y.15. |
| 0x17 | CMD_EXPORT_PRIVATE_KEY | Unsupported/disabled | Return RESP_CODE_DISABLED or ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Never export LICHEN native private keys. |
| 0x18 | CMD_IMPORT_PRIVATE_KEY | Unsupported/disabled | Return RESP_CODE_DISABLED or ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Never replace LICHEN native identity through MeshCore shim. |
| 0x19 | CMD_SEND_RAW_DATA | Unsupported | MeshCore raw data/path semantics are RF-specific. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x1a | CMD_SEND_LOGIN | Unsupported | Remote repeater/login flow. ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x1b | CMD_SEND_STATUS_REQ | Unsupported | Remote status request over MeshCore RF. ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x1c | CMD_HAS_CONNECTION | Unsupported/read-only | MeshCore connection state not available; ERR_NOT_FOUND or ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x1d | CMD_LOGOUT | Unsupported/no-op | Remote connection logout not meaningful. ERR_UNSUPPORTED or OK no-op only if app requires harmless disconnect semantics. |
| 0x1e | CMD_GET_CONTACT_BY_KEY | Optional after identity projection | Return CONTACT for known projected key; otherwise ERR_NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x1f | CMD_GET_CHANNEL | Mandatory baseline | Return compatibility channel slot info. Native OSCORE/group secrets MUST NOT be exposed; policy blocked on 9c4y.17. |
| 0x20 | CMD_SET_CHANNEL | Optional compatibility-local | 16-byte secret variant may store compatibility-local channel only after 9c4y.17. 32-byte secret variant remains ERR_UNSUPPORTED matching firmware. |
| 0x21 | CMD_SIGN_START | Unsupported | MeshCore device signing is not LICHEN trust. ERR_UNSUPPORTED/RESP_DISABLED. |
| 0x22 | CMD_SIGN_DATA | Unsupported | ERR_UNSUPPORTED or BAD_STATE if no sign session. |
| 0x23 | CMD_SIGN_FINISH | Unsupported | ERR_UNSUPPORTED or BAD_STATE if no sign session. |
| 0x24 | CMD_SEND_TRACE_PATH | Unsupported | MeshCore path trace is RF/path-specific. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x25 | CMD_SET_DEVICE_PIN | Optional BLE policy | Only if 9c4y.15 defines MeshCore BLE PIN storage; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Invalid PIN ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG. |
| 0x26 | CMD_SET_OTHER_PARAMS | Optional compatibility-local/read-only | Manual add, telemetry modes, loc policy, multi-acks may be compatibility-local; unsupported until policy. |
| 0x27 | CMD_SEND_TELEMETRY_REQ | Stub/unsupported | Self telemetry may return local placeholder later; remote telemetry is unsupported. ERR_UNSUPPORTED initially. |
| 0x28 | CMD_GET_CUSTOM_VARS | Optional stub | Return RESP_CODE_CUSTOM_VARS with empty payload or deterministic key/value placeholders. |
| 0x29 | CMD_SET_CUSTOM_VAR | Optional compatibility-local | Unsupported unless a compatibility config store owns the variable; malformed key/value ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG. |
| 0x2a | CMD_GET_ADVERT_PATH | Unsupported | MeshCore advert path not LICHEN RPL route. ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x2b | CMD_GET_TUNING_PARAMS | Optional read-only stub | Return fixed placeholders only if useful for app UX; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x2c..0x31 | Reserved Wi-Fi range | Unsupported | ERR_UNSUPPORTED for any received command in this range. |
| 0x32 | CMD_SEND_BINARY_REQ | Unsupported initially | Remote binary request. ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. |
| 0x33 | CMD_FACTORY_RESET | Unsupported by default | Requires explicit device-management policy; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. Do not format storage from shim. |
| 0x34 | CMD_SEND_PATH_DISCOVERY_REQ | Unsupported | MeshCore flood/path discovery does not map to LICHEN. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x35 | Unassigned in firmware constants | Unsupported | ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x36 | CMD_SET_FLOOD_SCOPE_KEY | Unsupported | MeshCore flood scope secret must not map to LICHEN keys. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x37 | CMD_SEND_CONTROL_DATA | Unsupported | MeshCore control data/zero-hop discovery. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x38 | CMD_GET_STATS | Optional read-only | Can return RESP_CODE_STATS for core/radio/packets with HAL/app counters once defined; unknown subtype ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG. Stub as ERR_UNSUPPORTED initially. |
| 0x39 | CMD_SEND_ANON_REQ | Unsupported | Remote anonymous request. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x3a | CMD_SET_AUTOADD_CONFIG | Optional compatibility-local | Store only MeshCore-local auto-add config if policy exists; otherwise ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x3b | CMD_GET_AUTOADD_CONFIG | Optional read-only | Return RESP_CODE_AUTOADD_CONFIG fixed disabled values or compatibility-local values. |
| 0x3c | CMD_GET_ALLOWED_REPEAT_FREQ | Optional read-only/unsupported | May return empty RESP_ALLOWED_REPEAT_FREQ or ERR_UNSUPPORTED; no LICHEN RF repeat policy implied. |
| 0x3d | CMD_SET_PATH_HASH_MODE | Optional compatibility-local | Store display/path hash mode for local API only or ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x3e | CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_DATA | Optional binary datagram | Do not map until LICHEN app datagram contract exists. Validate path_len/data_type if decoded; default ERR_UNSUPPORTED/NOT_FOUND. Note meshcore_py lacks this enum. |
| 0x3f | CMD_SET_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE | Unsupported | Flood scope key/name must not map to LICHEN secrets. ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x40 | CMD_GET_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE | Optional read-only null | Return RESP_CODE_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE length 1 (null) or ERR_UNSUPPORTED. |
| 0x41 | CMD_SEND_RAW_PACKET | Unsupported | Raw MeshCore packet send is forbidden by RF boundary. ERR_UNSUPPORTED or ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG for malformed. Note meshcore_py lacks this enum. |

Push/response matrix:

| Code | Name | LICHEN policy |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 0x00 | RESP_CODE_OK | Use for successful supported/local no-op operations only. |
| 0x01 | RESP_CODE_ERR | Primary deterministic error envelope; second byte is MeshCore error code. |
| 0x02/0x03/0x04 | CONTACTS_START/CONTACT/END | Required for GET_CONTACTS; empty list allowed. |
| 0x05 | SELF_INFO | Required for APP_START. |
| 0x06 | SENT | Required for direct send if supported; channel send ACK unresolved by 9c4y.16. |
| 0x07/0x08 | old message receive | Avoid for MVP; use V3 codes for app protocol v3+. |
| 0x09 | CURR_TIME | Required for GET_DEVICE_TIME. |
| 0x0a | NO_MORE_MESSAGES | Required for empty sync queue. |
| 0x0b | EXPORT_CONTACT | Optional only with compatibility contact export. |
| 0x0c | BATT_AND_STORAGE | Required read response. |
| 0x0d | DEVICE_INFO | Required for DEVICE_QUERY. |
| 0x0e | PRIVATE_KEY | Forbidden; never emit for LICHEN private material. |
| 0x0f | DISABLED | Allowed for disabled private-key/signing/security-sensitive commands. |
| 0x10/0x11 | CONTACT_MSG_RECV_V3/CHANNEL_MSG_RECV_V3 | Required for queued incoming text when messaging claimed. |
| 0x12 | CHANNEL_INFO | Required for GET_CHANNEL. |
| 0x13/0x14 | SIGN_START/SIGNATURE | Unsupported; do not emit for LICHEN signing. |
| 0x15 | CUSTOM_VARS | Optional empty/read-only. |
| 0x16 | ADVERT_PATH | Unsupported/not found. |
| 0x17 | TUNING_PARAMS | Optional read-only placeholder. |
| 0x18 | STATS | Optional read-only. |
| 0x19 | AUTOADD_CONFIG | Optional read-only/local. |
| 0x1a | ALLOWED_REPEAT_FREQ | Optional empty/read-only. |
| 0x1b | CHANNEL_DATA_RECV | Optional only if datagram contract exists. |
| 0x1c | DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE | Optional null/read-only; never expose native secrets. |
| 0x80 | PUSH_ADVERT | Optional only as compatibility-local contact event; not required for MVP. |
| 0x81 | PUSH_PATH_UPDATED | Unsupported unless compatibility path placeholder exists; not LICHEN routing. |
| 0x82 | PUSH_SEND_CONFIRMED | Optional if app message ack mapping exists. |
| 0x83 | PUSH_MSG_WAITING | Required when queued incoming message exists. |
| 0x84 | PUSH_RAW_DATA | Unsupported. |
| 0x85/0x86/0x87 | login/status pushes | Unsupported remote repeater/admin flows. |
| 0x88 | PUSH_LOG_RX_DATA | Unsupported; do not expose raw MeshCore RF logs. |
| 0x89 | PUSH_TRACE_DATA | Unsupported. |
| 0x8a | PUSH_NEW_ADVERT | Optional compatibility contact discovery only. |
| 0x8b/0x8c/0x8d/0x8e | telemetry/binary/path/control pushes | Unsupported initially. |
| 0x8f/0x90 | contact-deleted/contacts-full | Optional only if compatibility contact store exists. |

Minimum implementation phases:
1. Codec/dispatcher phase: define all command/response constants and return deterministic ERR_UNSUPPORTED for every valid-but-unsupported command. Support APP_START, DEVICE_QUERY, GET_CONTACTS empty, GET_CHANNEL placeholder/null policy, SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE empty, GET_BATT_AND_STORAGE placeholder, GET_DEVICE_TIME, GET_CUSTOM_VARS empty, GET_AUTOADD_CONFIG disabled, GET_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE null.
2. Messaging phase: add SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG and incoming MSG_WAITING/SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE once shared app-interface send/receive contract exists. Resolve ACK drift first in 9c4y.16.
3. Identity/channel phase: enable direct text, contacts, contact lookup/export/import, and channel set only after 9c4y.14 and 9c4y.17 are complete.
4. Optional diagnostics phase: stats/tuning/read-only placeholders if real clients require them.

Follow-up coverage:
- 9c4y.16 covers command drift, especially SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG OK vs SENT and stale Python enums.
- 9c4y.17 covers channel/config secret exposure and config write persistence.
- 9c4y.14 covers public-key/prefix identity projection.
- 9c4y.15 covers BLE PIN/security/coexistence.
- 9c4y.18 covers canonical vectors for this matrix.
notes:
Input from project-LICHEN-9c4y.1 research: the command matrix must account for firmware/client drift. MeshCore firmware at e8d3c53 returns OK for CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG in MyMesh.cpp while companion_protocol.md and meshcore-open send flow imply MSG_SENT/respCodeSent in some paths. Also meshcore_py at 5bac357 lacks at least newer firmware enums such as CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_DATA=0x3e and CMD_SEND_RAW_PACKET=0x41. Matrix work should choose behavior against the target client set and test both OK-vs-MSG_SENT expectations where feasible.
Input from project-LICHEN-9c4y.3 codec strategy: command matrix should feed enum/constants for a handwritten no-allocation C codec. Unsupported known commands remain valid decoded command IDs so adapter error policy can respond deterministically, while malformed frame shapes are codec errors.
Review correction after Peirce the 2nd findings: the CMD_SEND_SELF_ADVERT (0x07) matrix row is superseded. LICHEN MUST return RESP_CODE_ERR + ERR_CODE_UNSUPPORTED_CMD for CMD_SEND_SELF_ADVERT in MVP; OK/no-op is not allowed because it would imply a MeshCore RF advert was transmitted. Unknown command bytes outside the defined MeshCore command range, including 0x00, 0x42, and 0xff, MUST return RESP_CODE_ERR + ERR_CODE_UNSUPPORTED_CMD. ERR_CODE_FILE_IO_ERROR (5) is reserved for future compatibility-store failures; MVP handlers that do not own persistent compatibility storage should not emit it except in a tested storage-failure path.
Review evidence: Boole the 2nd found no P0/P1/P2 blockers in the initial command coverage/source cross-check. Peirce the 2nd found a P1 unsafe OK/no-op allowance for CMD_SEND_SELF_ADVERT and P2 gaps for out-of-range unknown commands plus ERR_CODE_FILE_IO_ERROR policy. Corrections were recorded in project-LICHEN-9c4y.13 and downstream project-LICHEN-9c4y.9/.18, then pushed in b9389847. Follow-up reviewers Halley the 2nd and Noether the 2nd found no remaining P0/P1/P2 blockers and confirmed self-advert is now ERR_UNSUPPORTED, unknown bytes 0x00/0x42/0xff are explicit ERR_UNSUPPORTED, and ERR_CODE_FILE_IO_ERROR is reserved for tested compatibility-store failures.
close_reason: Completed: MeshCore command/response/push matrix recorded, review findings fixed, downstream implementation/vector Beads updated, and follow-up reviews cleared closure.
